title: Google's Agents CLI: The CLI + Skills Combination to Ship AI Agents EASILY
summary: Google's Agents CLI is an open source tool that enables building and deploying AI agents to production with integrated identity management, sandboxed code execution, and audit trails. The CLI works with any AI coding assistant and simplifies the traditionally complex process of shipping production-grade AI agents.
writeup: Cole Medin walks through Google's Agents CLI, an open source tool for building and deploying AI agents to production. The CLI integrates identity management, sandboxed code execution, and audit trails, addressing parts of agent deployment that are typically complex to assemble. It works with any AI coding assistant rather than locking into one tool. The combination of the CLI and agent skills is positioned as the path to shipping production-grade agents.
